text: - 6.4 to: defective work, work to complete, punch-lists, quality control, safety and commissioning. It is intended that use of this project management system will enrich communication and collaboration between Contractor and Subcontractor. A limited, no expense license, or rights to participate in the system as a user, and any necessary training may be made available from Contractor for Subcontractor's personnel to use this system. Use of this system is strongly encouraged as it will expedite the process. Subcontractor will equip its lead foreman or superintendent with an iPad, supplied by Subcontractor, for best use of the Procore project management system.
